title: Secret of the Angels
wikitext:
[]: Secret of the Angels.......             Quote Post by Sachi » Thu Nov 09, 2006 8:06 pm ok, now that ive got ur attention, i guess i should start this discussion. THE SECRET OF THE ANGELS wat was the secret of the Angels where did they come from? who sent them? evidence suggests that SEELE sent the Angels, or at least assisted them in any way possible. just like the incident with the 9th Angel how does it just so happen that the power went out? SEELE som1 on the inside shut off the power, and who else but SEELE? if u want to talk about any of SEELEs secrets or the Angels, this is the place!

[]:             Quote Post by cat42 » Thu Nov 09, 2006 8:16 pm The Angels came from Adam, this is stated in the series. Adam was sent by the FAR, this is stated in the NGE2 Classified Information. Their secret is that they are the form of life that should have been thriving on earth, not us.

[]: Re: Secret of the Angels.......             Quote Post by Reichu » Thu Nov 09, 2006 10:25 pm Sachiel_13 wrote: wat was the secret of the Angels where did they come from?

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Fri Nov 10, 2006 1:39 am lol, ok i kno that they came from Adam, but when they went searching for him, to cause the 3rd impact, where did they come from. not where did they originate

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Fri Nov 10, 2006 1:52 am Second, or Third? Apparently Adam laid a few eggies in the White Moon before misfortune struck her in the sternum. They laid around doing nothing until Adam finally woke up, opened her Doors of Guf, gave them souls, and promptly blew sky-high. It's thought that the eggs went helter-skelter from there -- some went out into space, others were strewn across Earth. Most landed in the oceans; narrativium directed one into Mt. Asama. Then they incubated, and hatched, and head off for Tokyo-3 because the script said so.

[]:             Quote Post by master0rolando » Fri Nov 10, 2006 4:10 am this whole First Ancestrial Race buisness makes my head spin theres no way anyone could get that by watching any part of the show... (personally i think Anno shouldve just stuck with them being divine beings...but nooooo...Aliens came and laid eggs...its just too..."SciFi channelish" for Evangelion)

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Fri Nov 10, 2006 4:19 am master0rolando wrote: theres no way anyone could get that by watching any part of the show...

[]:             Quote Post by master0rolando » Fri Nov 10, 2006 4:55 am Reichu wrote: Naw. The "clearly artificial" surface of the White Moon and Gendo's comment about SOMEBODY ELSE having excavated the Geofront weren't implying a thing.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Fri Nov 10, 2006 5:06 am master0rolando wrote: Of course... :roll: how stupid of me...how could i NOT understand that it was in fact Aliens that created Adam from that...

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Fri Nov 10, 2006 1:45 pm master0rolando wrote: Aliens came and laid eggs...its just too..."SciFi channelish" for Evangelion)

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Sun Nov 12, 2006 2:48 am y did the 9TH AND 10TH Angels have eyes all over?

[]:             Quote Post by MaggotMaster » Sun Nov 12, 2006 3:12 am Sachiel_13 wrote: y did the 9TH AND 10TH Angels have eyes all over?

[]:             Quote Post by Anonymous_Evafan » Sun Nov 12, 2006 3:46 am More like because they felt like it.

[]:             Quote Post by master0rolando » Sun Nov 12, 2006 3:47 am actually its kinda funny... the first time you EVER see Evangelion...its like...zomg Aliums!!! then later its...not aliums??? then later its like...ACTUAL ANGELS!?!?!?! and now it turns out they were MOTHAF**KIN ALIUMS!!!

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Sun Nov 12, 2006 4:24 am What in the name of Sammael is an "alium"? Is that kind of like a helium or a uranium? </smartass>

[]:             Quote Post by BobBQ » Sun Nov 12, 2006 5:26 am Alium: the phlebotanide element of which extraterrestrial creatures are most often made.

[]:             Quote Post by Israfel777 » Mon Nov 13, 2006 2:26 am BobBQ wrote: Alium: the phlebotanide element of which extraterrestrial creatures are most often made.

[]:             Quote Post by MaggotMaster » Mon Nov 13, 2006 2:52 am ANGELS ARE NOT ALIENS, THEY WERE IN THIS PLANET BEFORE US, OR AT LEAST I'VE HEARD THAT ADAM WAS THE FIRST SOL TO GET HERE. IF ANYONE IS AN ALIEN IN EVANGELION IT'S LILITH AND HER SPAWN

[]: Re: Secret of the Angels.......             Quote Post by Rawinder » Tue Nov 14, 2006 10:59 pm Sachiel_13 wrote: where did they come from?

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Wed Nov 15, 2006 2:20 am How was Kaji supposed to do anything if he was stuck in an elevator?
